location: On a corpse in a wagon near the First Mt. Gelmir Campsite Site of Grace, close to the ladder where the Grafted Scion boss lands after dropping in.

source.name: corpse pickup, First Mt. Gelmir Campsite wagon

tactics: From First Mt. Gelmir Campsite grace, head northwest through the ruined encampment toward a stone bridge
A Grafted Scion ambushes players near the ladder by the corpse — it hits very hard for this stage of the game, so be ready to retreat rather than fight it head-on
The sword sits on the corpse near that ladder; you can often grab it and pull back without fully committing to the Scion fight
Only one copy is obtainable per playthrough
lore: Its edge is notched like a row of shark's teeth — a scavenged, battle-worn blade favored by the corpse-pillagers who pick over old battlefields for anything of value.

builds.name: Arcane bleed build
builds.why: Innate Blood Loss buildup that scales with Arcane, and being the only infusable curved sword with a built-in status effect, makes it a strong base for a Blood- or Occult-infused bleed build.
